get.summary: Get account balances for the authenticated business

parameters.name: currencyAlias
parameters.description: Filter balances by currency alias (e.g., usdt_binance)

parameters.name: currencyId
parameters.description: Deprecated. Use currencyAlias instead. Will be removed in a future version.

parameters.name: isParentOnly
parameters.description: Filter to only include parent currencies (default: true)

parameters.name: currencyType
parameters.description: Filter by currency type (FIAT, CRYPTO, NFT)

get.summary: Get a specific account balance by public ID for the authenticated business

403.description: Forbidden - Balance does not belong to business

get.summary: Get balance history for a specific account balance

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by history type (INVOICE, PAYOUT, PAYOUT_FEE, ADJUSTMENT)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by history status (CREDIT, DEBIT, NEGATIVE_ADJ)

403.description: Forbidden - Balance does not belong to business

get.summary: Export balance history as CSV for a specific account balance

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by history type (INVOICE, PAYOUT, PAYOUT_FEE, ADJUSTMENT)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by history status (CREDIT, DEBIT, NEGATIVE_ADJ)

403.description: Forbidden - Balance does not belong to business

parameters.name: blockchainType
parameters.description: Filter by blockchain type (EVM, TRON, SOLANA)

parameters.name: networkSlug
parameters.description: Filter by network slug (e.g., ethereum, polygon)

400.description: Currency not available via this API

get.summary: List invoices for the authenticated account

patch.description:
Update invoice fields (customerEmail, customerName, reference, redirectUrl, webhookUrl, expiredAt).

Use `POST :id/activate` for payment configuration and activation.
Use `POST :id/cancel` for cancellation.

**Allowed statuses**: PREPARED, ACTIVE

400.description: Bad request - Invoice cannot be updated in current status

post.description:
Activate a PREPARED invoice by configuring payment method.

**Required**: sourceCurrencyId
**Optional**: expiredAt (custom expiration)

Exchange rate is fetched automatically. This endpoint assigns a wallet and transitions the invoice to ACTIVE status.

400.description: Bad request - Invoice cannot be activated or missing required fields
Bad request - Invoice cannot be cancelled in current status

get.summary: Get all crypto assets with exchange rates
get.description: Returns all supported crypto assets with their exchange rates to fiat currencies and supported networks.

parameters.name: currencies
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fiat currency symbols to filter (e.g., USD,IDR)

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid API key

get.summary: Get exchange rates for a specific crypto asset
get.description: Returns exchange rates for a specific crypto asset (e.g., BTC, ETH, USDT) to all fiat currencies, including supported networks.

parameters.name: asset
parameters.description: Crypto asset symbol (e.g., BTC, ETH, USDT)

parameters.name: currencies
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of fiat currency symbols to filter (e.g., USD,IDR)

401.description: Unauthorized - Missing or invalid API key

get.summary: Get payouts for business API key

post.summary: Create a new payout for business API key

parameters.name: X-Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional idempotency key to prevent duplicate payout creation. Use a unique string (e.g., UUID) to ensure the same request returns the same result if retried.

201.description: The business payout has been created successfully.

404.description: Routing, currency, or network not found

409.description: Conflict - Payout creation already in progress for this idempotency key

post.summary: Inquire account details for business API key

200.description: The account details have been retrieved successfully.

404.description: Routing, currency, or network not found

post.summary: Get payout information including fees and validation requirements for business API key

200.description: The payout information has been retrieved successfully.

404.description: Routing, currency, or network not found

get.summary: Get status progression history for a specific payout (business API)

404.description: Payout not found or does not belong to this account

get.summary: Get specific payout details for business API key

403.description: Forbidden - Business API access or ownership required

info.title: Appreal API - Business
info.description: API used for on-ramp and off-ramp transaction

id.description: Public identifier of the referenced invoice or payout (CUID2)

number.description: Human-readable reference number (invoice number for INVOICE, payout number for PAYOUT/PAYOUT_FEE, empty for ADJUSTMENT)

id.description: Balance history entry ID (internal, omitted in business API)

status.description: Transaction status (CREDIT increases balance, DEBIT decreases)

creditAmount.description: Credit amount (In) - populated when status is CREDIT, null otherwise

debitAmount.description: Debit amount (Out) - populated when status is DEBIT, null otherwise

currency.description: Currency symbol (e.g., ETH, USDT). Required if currencyId not provided.

network.description: Network name (e.g., ethereum, polygon). Required if currencyId not provided.

currencyId.description: Currency ID (UUID). Alternative to currency + network.

expiredAt.description: Custom expiration date/time (ISO 8601). If not provided, uses default.

reference.description: Custom reference data attached to the invoice

sourceCurrencyAlias.description: Source currency alias for payment (e.g., usdt_binance). Preferred over sourceCurrencyId.

sourceCurrencyId.description: Source currency UUID. Use sourceCurrencyAlias when possible.

expiredAt.description: Custom expiration date/time (ISO 8601). If not provided, uses default.

updatedAt.description: When the rate was last updated

assets.description: List of all crypto assets with rates

validUntil.description: Timestamp when rates expire and should be refreshed
Timestamp when rates expire and should be refreshed

buyRate.description: Buy rate (what user pays to buy base currency)

sellRate.description: Sell rate (what user receives when selling base currency)

baseCurrencyInfo.description: Base currency info with name and logo

quoteCurrencyInfo.description: Quote currency info with name and logo

externalId.description: External ID used by the provider
External ID used by the provider (e.g., "bitcoin" for CoinGecko)
External ID used by the provider

accountId.description: Account ID that will be charged for this payout. Optional for merchants (uses their account), required for admins

destinationCurrencyId.description: Target currency ID (what the recipient will receive)

sourceCurrencyId.description: Source currency ID (what will be deducted from account)

routingId.description: Payout Provider Routing ID for routing the payout

recipientId.description: Existing recipient ID from payout_fiat_recipients or payout_cryptocurrency_recipients table

recipientName.description: Recipient full name (required if recipientId not provided)

recipientIdNumber.description: Recipient ID number (required if recipientId not provided)

recipientPlaceOfBirth.description: Recipient place of birth (required if recipientId not provided)

recipientBirthDate.description: Recipient birth date (required if recipientId not provided)

recipientAddress.description: Recipient address (required if recipientId not provided)

recipientBankAccountNumber.description: Bank account number for bank transfers

description.description: Description or purpose of the payout

destinationCurrencyId.description: Target currency ID for the account inquiry

sourceCurrencyId.description: Source currency ID for the inquiry

routingId.description: Payout Provider Routing ID for routing the inquiry

amount.description: Amount to get payout info for

destinationCurrencyId.description: Target currency ID (what the recipient will receive)

sourceCurrencyId.description: Source currency ID (what will be deducted from account)

accountId.description: Account ID to get payout info for. Optional for merchants (uses their account), required for admins

referenceText.description: Reference text for the payout completion (required)

failureReason.description: Failure reason for the payout (optional - will use default if not provided)

recipientBankAccountNumber.description: Bank account number for bank transfers

description.description: Description or purpose of the payout

amount.description: Amount to get payout info for

currencyId.description: Currency ID to apply this limit to
